description: 💰 Calculate net profit from Airbnb rentals: deduct commissions, expenses, taxes. Free calculator for 2026.
intro: Short-term rental markets operate under specific regulations and incur commissions, platform fees, and recurring expenses. Calculate your net profit from Airbnb listings: after deducting commissions, property expenses, and taxes. Values are updated for 2026 and reviewed regularly.
keyTakeaway: Formula: **Gross Income − Expenses**. Direct calculation of what you keep from Airbnb after deducting commissions, property costs, and taxes.
useCases: Technical calculations for short-term rental net profit
Quick reference for rental property planning
explanation:
Short-term rental income is subject to local regulations and tax codes. Calculate your actual net profit by factoring in all operational costs including platform commissions, property maintenance, and taxes.

## How to Calculate

This calculator applies the formula using your inputs, checking for reasonable ranges and alerting you to unusual or unrealistic values.

## Important Notes

This calculation is for reference only. For critical financial decisions, consult with a tax professional or real estate advisor. Values are current as of 2026 and updated periodically.

faq.a: Airbnb charges 3% host service fee plus 6-14% guest service fee. Your total commission depends on your pricing and market.

faq.q: What's a realistic occupancy rate for short-term rentals?
faq.a: Urban markets typically see 40-70% occupancy, while peak-season destinations achieve 80-95% occupancy year-round.

faq.q: What taxes do I owe on Airbnb income?
faq.a: Tax obligations vary by location. Consult a tax professional about income tax, sales tax, and local rental registration requirements.

faq.q: How profitable is Airbnb compared to long-term rentals?
faq.a: Short-term rentals typically generate 2-3x higher returns than traditional long-term rentals, but require more active management.

faq.q: Who pays for cleaning between guests?
faq.a: You can charge a separate cleaning fee that guests pay directly, or factor cleaning costs into your nightly rate.

faq.q: What hidden costs should I budget for?
faq.a: Include furnishings, deep cleaning, maintenance repairs, professional photography, utilities, and insurance in your budget.

faq.q: Do I need a business license for Airbnb rentals?
faq.a: Requirements vary by location and local jurisdiction. Check your city or county regulations before listing your property.

faq.q: What insurance do short-term rental hosts need?
faq.a: Standard homeowner's insurance may not cover short-term rentals. Consider commercial rental insurance or dedicated host protection plans.

sources.name: NIST — National Institute of Standards and Technology

dataUpdate.notes: Fixed formula, does not require external data updates
